title: Observing Earth from space can help companies make better decisions
description: Lithuanian earth observation companies are leveraging artificial intelligence to refine the way they deliver data solutions to clients.

title: driven lending models can unlock USD 170 bn MSME credit gap in India: Govt
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered lending models could help unlock an estimated USD 130-170 billion credit gap for India's MSMEs by using digital payment trails, GST filings and utility bill data instead of relying only on traditional credit scores, according to a PIB release on Wednesday.
content: New Delhi [India], May 13 (ANI): Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered lending models could help unlock an estimated USD 130-170 billion credit gap for India's MSMEs by using digital payment trails, GST filings and utility bill data instead of relying... [2933 chars]

title: Trump-Xi Summit Puts AI Rivalry in Spotlight Amid Mythos Model Shockwaves
description: U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping are set to put artificial intelligence at the forefront of their Beijing summit amid rising mistrust and U.S. chip controls.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump will put artificial intelligence at the forefront of talks this week with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, a first that highlights the technology's strategic heft but substantive commitments are unlikely, said two U.S. officials... [4645 chars]

title: Targeting 30 pc EV sales by 2030, Bihar govt nod to policy amendments
description: Bihar is boosting electric vehicle adoption. The state government aims for 30 percent of new vehicle sales to be electric by 2030. Incentives will be offered for electric commercial vehicles, two-wheelers, and four-wheelers. Charging stations will also be established. Additionally, Bihar is launching an Artificial Intelligence Mission to foster innovation and skill development.
content:

title: Japan Megabanks Set to Win Mythos Access After Bessent Visit
description: Japan’s three megabanks are set to secure access to Anthropic’s artificial intelligence model Mythos, according to a person familiar with the matter, after its limited release last month sparked fears of a new age of cybersecurity risks.
content:

title: Tech Startup Advanced Impactor Reshaping Cricket Coaching Through AI
description: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], May 13: Cricket has always been a sport driven by instinct, repetition, and the trained eye of coaches. From local academies to international dressing rooms, player development has traditionally depended on observation-based assessments and verbal feedback. But as technology begins to influence every layer of sport globally, cricket too is entering a new era, one where artificial intelligence, biomechanics, and performance analytics are transforming how players learn, train, and improve.

title: AI transcriber for use by Ontario doctors 'hallucinated,' generated errors, auditor finds
description: Artificial intelligence note-taking tools intended for use by Ontario doctors provided incorrect and incomplete information or demonstrated "hallucinations," and were not evaluated adequately, the province’s auditor general says in a new report.
content:

title: SK Hynix CEO to meet Bill Gates, Satya Nadella for discussions on AI chip partnerships
description: SK hynix CEO Kwak Noh-Jung will meet Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates and CEO Satya Nadella this week at the closed-door Microsoft CEO Summit 2026 in Redmond, Washington, to discuss strengthening ties in the artificial intelligence chip sector.
